case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,128.37 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-30-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-04-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST. $1,128.37 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,158.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,192.19 AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAT TUAN IND/DBA CARIC QUALITY CONST.
